# Crypto Exchanges Face 48Hr Proof of Reserves Deadline

*MarketFlock Lead Analyst | July 23, 2026*

---

## 🎯 The Intelligence Signal
The Trust Deficit For most of the crypto industry’s history, users who deposited assets with an exchange simply trusted that the funds were there. FTX ended that complacency when it collapsed in 2022, with investigators finding that billions in customer deposits had been quietly diverted to it
